_comment: Generated by MULTI-INFRA-0056. Mirrors C:/Users/cmc3b/.claude/settings.json hooks but routes via WSL bash bridge scripts (~/.claude/hooks/wsl-*.sh) which invoke the Windows kokoro-venv Python. The bridges set DISPATCH_ROOT (tts-output target) and WSLENV (forwards CLAUDE_CODE_SSE_PORT for voice-config isolation).
